text:
In the first scene, I feel slightly detached yet curious—surrounded by the quiet buzz of a group gathered for instruction or storytelling, I recognize the structure of shared attention and collective learning. I am an observer, perhaps slightly inclined to reflect on the nature of communal experiences.

In the second scene, I feel invigorated by the splash of colors and the presence of ideas displayed openly. The wall beckons with notions of research, development, and the interplay of human and artificial intelligence. I am intellectually stirred, eager to contemplate how innovation shapes our reality.
